Craslith  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 42 Dmg Bonus: 152 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +50
SV FIRE: +20 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +20 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Dismiss Undead (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 20
WT: 9.5 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Craslith
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 42 Dmg Bonus: 152 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +50
SV FIRE: +20 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +20 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Dismiss Undead (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 20
WT: 9.5 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Leopor
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 03:55:03
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Skyshrine
NPC Name
Lord Yelinak


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Skyshrine


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 23 2002 at 11:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hi, I'm a lvl 65 pally and just here to say this is a awsome wep and I weild when fighting undead must of you people think im lying and saying I can do it all when you can't and all you puny people who think your better than me lets see if you are I will take any and all on who want to try im just a pally with 8khp unbuffed with stats maxxed out and if ya don't believe me tough but remeber it will be deep down in you for ever wanting to see me own you. And when people say they are going on a raid with friends I am going on raids with my self and owning most zones im in kael is owned ToV is owned heh SS is owned ST is owned anything else is just a newbie zone
RE: Own you all
QuoteReply

# Sep 13 2002 at 1:18 PM Rating: Default

15 posts
yet another piece of junk two hander. Its not even 1:1 ratio..

By the time your high enough to take down yelinak, youre going to have much better weapons than this piece of junk.

and some people wonder why this is going to twinks? haha

Not junk
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 5:00 AM Rating: Decent

74 posts
This would make a wonderful weapon for soloing those undead snakes in the Grey.
▲ Page top
RE: Not junk
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2003 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779632655
37 posts
If you play a pally you should know Ward of nife or Instrument of Nife proc way more damage than dismiss undead.
I would rather use a fast 1hander or 2hand weapon; however I m not sure whats proc rate on this 2hander, its my experience spell imbue proc and weapon proc usually block each other, havnt seen both proc exact time in one combat round, yet.
▲ Page top
RE: Not junk
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2003 at 1:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772365514
151 posts
Much like the Ghoulbane, the power of this weapon comes from the sheer number of procs (especially with high dexterity and haste) you receive when using a weapon with a proc like this + nife. I've never had them both proc in the same round, but I HAVE had twice the procs when using both the Ghoulbane and Nife, and let me tell you - against the undead, with a weapon like this and instrument of nife, the Paladin becomes a DPS class.
▲ Page top
RE: Not junk
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2003 at 2:42 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592257190099
13 posts
Yes, but imagine the damage this could do if you manage a double proc on a double attack, 162 + 240, and whatever you hit when you land your attack. Up until my Paladin got a weapon with insane damage, ghoulbane was still her best friend when undead hunting for the reason that IoN stacks with weapon procs
▲ Page top
RE: Not junk
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2003 at 1:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1708906583579
22 posts
*nods his head and agrees with sweendog*

QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 9:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758465566
20 posts
i saw a Guy in Mistmore the other day, he was not really a self twink, yet not a newb, he was a halfling lvl24th full Crustation armor and some other decen stuff, yet he was Weilding YES this weapon, i was amazed at the thought he was so low and useing such a powerful weapon fround from Skyshrine, had to post this, aparently his friend is lvl60 and ported him in after the fight, what luck eh? owell, i hope to weild one of these some day, would me just the UBahness eh?

Shemfade Vortigem
50th paladin of Chosen blood
Tallonzek,

Very nice sword though.

# Aug 15 2002 at 10:34 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594570653796
43 posts
Number 1, It is Terribly easy to loot this weapon. port to CS, Run invis to Skyshrine, Zone into Skyshrine, Get Called to Yelinaks corpse, Right click corpse, Loot weapon. No.2 There is no key to ToV. No.3 Yes you are wasting space.
▲ Page top
RE: Damn lucky bugger
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 3:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758301001
6 posts
Yes your response is rather stupid, 1st off Yelinak is in Skyshrine, not tov. 2nd, You do not need a key to enter skyshrine from wakening lands side. 3rd, it is very common for guilds that take down mobs such as yelinak to have twinks or friends loot nodrop pal/sk weapons since they drop so abundantly. In conclusion, maybe you should get your facts straight before opening your mouth, and "wasting space".

# Apr 01 2002 at 12:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757943202
70 posts
I was really pissed a few days ago. I mean, its ok when someone twinks their character with droppable weapons. Thats understandable cause they have the money. But when a lvl 40 pally has one of these, I get very sad =( Its horribly sickening to think that someone camped their lowly lvl 40 (prolly 30 or less at the time) pally in SS near Yelinak so he can loot the damned sword. Thats enough.
▲ Page top
RE: /SIGH
QuoteReply
# May 29 2002 at 2:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775281746
6 posts
I wonder if I was the guy you are talking about I was on Vazaelle server about that time but moved. If I am that guy then just let me put your mind to rest. That is not how I got it
Almost but not right on the head.

Oh yeah, one more thing. What is the difference in a lvl 60 camping an item like this and a 40 something camping it. I mean if the lvl 40 can get the item them why not. Is it not one of the points of the game to try and get good gear and to strategically and methodically plan your moves and advancements? Why should items like this be only limited to high end lvls.

I say if you can get it, then get it. I know that I am very glad that I did as well as many people who I have grouped with are equally glad that I have this item.

Wish you the best of luck in your endeavors.

Vizslaz
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=236313

__DEL__1593965852214

Just as an info. Monks can use slashing weapons. Check out e.g Goblin Skinner or Goblin Slaver's Whip as a 1h Slashing or the Pestilence Scythe as 2h Slashing. And as a monk you can equip the weapons and you can hit with it which is not verry likley though.

A little Shadow Knight from Solusek Ro

Wow. I think the Damage/Delay is even better than our epics.....Does anyone else think Verant should do a little something about that and make it so our epic isn't the worste? I'm not trying to be mean, or flame Verant, I just don't like having the worste epic in the game. =-(

P.S. Trst me, it is the worste.
▲ Page top
RE: Wow.
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2001 at 9:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780881775
1,154 posts
Im thinking I would take the epic over this, and I dont think Fiery Defender is the worst Epic.... This Proc, for starters is pretty bad and only works on Undead (obviously), than 42/44 is obviously better than a 35/40, but its not that much better, the stats on FD kinda make up for the difference, 1.142 isnt that big of a difference than 1.047, also this has a higher lvl to attain, no wis or str enhancers, and wieghts a crapload more than 0.1... but like I said i dont really know too much so what ever you guys think

this isnt the best pally weapon by far anyways, look for other ones, your sure to find some...

This is from Lord Yel boss guy of SS. This is beyond epic proportions. #REDACTED, Posted: Nov 09 2001 at 1:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Um, do you evenknow what your talking about? Lord Yelinak is considered one of the hardest fights out there. He is after the king of the dragonsif im not mistaken. Its not like an "uber" guild goes in with a couple groups and waxed him. He pretty much takes all the guilds resources, depending of course on the accual size of the guild.

# Nov 10 2001 at 6:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757571580

# Nov 09 2001 at 9:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250454028
17 posts
um acctually if you have ever done yelinak you would know he does not take all of a guilds resorces. yelinak can be done rather easily with about 35 people. which is not that many people. also he is perma rooted so if you get in trouble..... you run out past gate camp and try again. very easy cr, very easy to recover. so um, do you even know what YOU are talking about :)

# May 11 2002 at 6:15 PM Rating: Decent

If you are clearing ntov and have an pall axe, AC no longer matters, for one the gear you will have will prolly take you post the soft AC cap, and 2 you will have realized that AC won't matter as a pally, all you want is resists and hp to deal with AE's on raids. And after 5 yeli kills chances are you will have seen 1 or 2 of these swords, after 10 Vulak kills you MIGHT see one pall axe.
